lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What did Solomon do that angered God?
What did God say He would do as punishment?
answers: Tear away most of Solomon's kingdom
Let Solomon's enemies defeat him in battle

questions.text: What did Ahijah do to show what would happen to Solomon's kingdom?
answers: He tore a garment into 12 pieces and gave 10 to Jeroboam
He broke a crown into 12 pieces
He drew a picture in the dirt
He prayed that fire would fall from heaven

questions.text: What did the people ask Rehoboam to do?
What did the older wise men tell Rehoboam?
answers: Be kind and lighten the people’s work

questions.text: What did the younger wise men tell Rehoboam?
answers: Make the work harder and threaten the people
Make the people pay more taxes
Choose someone else to be king

questions.text: What did the people do when Rehoboam refused to help them?
answers: Ten tribes left and made Jeroboam their king

questions.text: How many tribes stayed with Rehoboam?
